name: current-2026-scoutgate-rolegate
description: Full 2026 replay testing coverage-aware scout-gated features after live Firebase import. ScoutGate keeps sparse scout observations from entering linear residual learning at full strength, while preserving the existing RoleV3/TailGuard baselines for direct comparison. RoleGate adds a stricter RoleV3Gated feature family: scout defense enters role reasoning through confidence-shrunk ScoutGate values, and gated role selection requires confidence >= 0.35.

notes: This is a feature-risk test: if ScoutGate wins only where scout coverage is dense but fails on broad 2026 replay, it should stay rejected.
Gate E2/S6 means event-scout evidence reaches confidence faster than season-wide scout evidence, but no current-match observation is visible before prediction.

RoleGate is a role-feature leakage/overfit pressure test: it should win only if confidence-shrunk scout role evidence improves held-out replay, not merely because raw scout defense sneaks through role features.
RG=C0.35 means the gated role summary records all role signals but only selects a defender when the pre-match role confidence reaches 0.35.
